cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE on)

add_compile_options(
        -fexceptions
        -frtti
<<<<<<< HEAD
        -std=c++17
        -Wall
        -Wpedantic
        -Wno-gnu-zero-variadic-macro-arguments
        -DLOG_TAG=\"Fabric\")

file(GLOB rrc_image_SRC CONFIGURE_DEPENDS *.cpp)
add_library(rrc_image SHARED ${rrc_image_SRC})

        -Wall
        -Wpedantic
